name: the-power-of-broke
description: Daymond John's The Power of Broke — an entrepreneurial scrappiness toolkit showing how limited resources force creativity, discipline, and hustle that wealthy competitors can't replicate.
useCase: Turn having no money into a competitive advantage — bootstrap smarter, build brand love, develop hustle, and learn Daymond John's lawnmower approach to building a business one customer at a time.
knownRisks: Daymond's approach assumes the reader has the time and energy for extreme hustle — not everyone does
Bootstrapping is not suitable for capital-intensive businesses
The Power of Broke mindset works best for consumer brands and service businesses
